channel.title: Updates on MIT Science Olympiad
channel.description: Recent content in Updates on MIT Science Olympiad

item.title: Exams Released
item.description: Exams and keys from the 2026 tournament have been publicly released here.

item.title: Results Uploaded
item.description: Final results and rankings have been uploaded here. More material such as full exam and solution will also be available soon.

item.title: Awards Link
item.description: Awards ceremony live stream link has been posted here.

item.title: Event Information Updated
item.description: Event information for Helicopter and Materials Science has been updated here.

item.title: Event Information Updated
item.description: Event-specific-information page has been updated here. You can find clarifications to how events are specifically being run at the MIT 2026 Invitational as well as trial events rules. This page will continue to be updated as more information becomes available.

item.title: Volunteer Information Updated
item.description: Volunteer page was added here for information on how to volunteer at the MIT 2026 Invitational!

item.title: Team List Updated
item.description: An updated list of teams admitted to the 2026 MIT Science Olympiad Invitational can be found here.

item.title: Team List Released
item.description: The list of teams admitted to the 2026 MIT Science Olympiad Invitational can be found here!

item.title: 2026 Registration Info
item.description: Registration for the MIT Science Olympiad is now open! Register here (open until 9/26 @ 6 PM ET). There is no priority given to teams that fill out this form earlier than other teams.

item.title: Event Supervisor Applications
item.description:
We’re excited to announce that applications are now open to event supervise for the 2026 MIT Science Olympiad Invitational on January 24, 2026!

The application for first-time event supervisors (i.e. you haven’t supervised for MIT before) can be found here.

The application for returning supervisors can be found here.

Applications will close on September 26, 2025 at 11:59 PM EST.

As always, feel free to reach out to us at scioly@mit.edu with any questions or concerns. We look forward to seeing you apply!

item.title: 2026 Tournament Registration
item.description:
Registration Details

Registration will be open from Wednesday, September 17, 2025 6:00 PM ET to Friday, September 26, 2025 6:00 PM ET. We will guarantee acceptance of schools that meet either of the following qualifications:

  • Schools that have placed Top 10 at the MIT Invitational the previous year
  • Schools that have placed Top 10 at the National Tournament the previous year

All teams that do not meet the qualifications for guaranteed acceptance will have their acceptance determined by a lottery. As we continue to grow our tournament, we aim to maintain a diverse pool of competitors while also upholding the rigor of our tournament. As such, we still strongly encourage all teams to apply, especially Massachusetts teams, regardless of their reputation or experience level.
